features.name: always_comb with forward variable reference
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a variable's RHS uses a variable assigned earlier in the same block
features.snippet: always_comb begin sig_a = in0 & in1; sig_b = ~sig_a; end

features.name: always_comb with variable reassignment after use
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block where a variable is assigned, used in RHS, then reassigned before the block ends
features.snippet: always_comb begin sig_a = in0 & in1; sig_b = ~sig_a; sig_a = in0; end

features.name: always_comb with multiple sequential assignments
features.description: Code should include an always_comb block with two or more sequential assignments where second assignment reads from first
features.snippet: always_comb begin x = a & b; y = ~x; end
